stemHtml: A pilot taxiing to runway 22 finds the tailwind now exceeds performance limits and requests runway 04 instead. What is the likely outcome?

options.a: Departure from runway 04, as the PIC has the final say on runway choice.
options.b: Departure from runway 04, but ATC must file an incident report.
options.c: Departure from runway 22, with ATC advising a higher take-off speed.
options.d: Departure from runway 22, since ATC decides the runway in use.
